items.title: TESSAN’s port-packed 7-in-1 USB-C travel adapter hits $18.50 Prime shipped
items.summary:
TESSAN 7-in-1 Universal USB-C Travel Adapter

Buy for $18.50 (Reg. $24)

What we love

This port-packed travel adapter wields three Type-C, two USB-A, and a couple of AC outlets. TESSAN touts it as a worldwide adapter that works in “over 150 countries” ranging from Europe to Spain, Fiji, Germany, and more.

items.title: Snap this magnetic Apple Watch band on your wrist for $20 (Save 41%)
items.summary:
Bandletic Magnetic Apple Watch Band

Buy for $20 (Reg. $34)

What we love

Magnetic silicone bands like this are one of my preferred everyday styles, especially when being active, tackling projects, and more. I like that they can take a bit of a beating and still look just fine. It’s also nice that they snap right into place with no manual latching required.

items.title: Monday’s Apple TV deals up to 70% off: Last Airbender, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, Justice League, Batman, more
items.summary: Monday’s lineup of the best Apple TV deals is now ready to roll, including loads of complete animated series: Avatar: The Last Airbender, The Legend of Korra, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2003), Justice League, The New Adventures of Batman, SpongeBob SquarePants, and more. We also have Amazon’s latest price drop on AirPods Pro 3, up to $130 off the most affordable Apple Watch Series 11 models, UGREEN’s 14th Anniversary sale now live with deals from just $7, and the ongoing Anker summer charging gear sale from $8. The Apple TV deals await below.

items.title: Step up your look for that formal wedding or gala with these modern wingtip shoes, now $35
items.summary:
Bruno Marc Modern Wingtip Shoes

Buy for $35 (Reg. $43)

What we love

If you have a formal occasion on the horizon, you may be in need of a nice pair of shoes. These should fit the bill and are available at this price across a wide variety of colorways and sizes. I personally own several pairs of Bruno Marc shoes and have had zero issues with them.

items.title: Apple Pay delivers 6% Daily Cash at Nike, here are our top sale picks from $23 (Up to 50% off)
items.summary: Apple and Nike have teamed up to deliver 6% Daily Cash on purchases on up to $500. If you have an Apple Card, you probably know that Daily Cash is just a fancy way of saying cash-back rewards, and 6% is a very respectable amount if you ask me. This is completely separate from the savings you’ll already get on sale items, so we’ve pieced together a nice little list for you down below.

items.title: London-based Valarian, which allows companies to use US cloud providers for AI workloads but retain control of their data, raised a $50M Series A led by NEA (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.summary:
Lily Mae Lazarus / Fortune:
London-based Valarian, which allows companies to use US cloud providers for AI workloads but retain control of their data, raised a $50M Series A led by NEA  —  Max Buchan started advocating for infrastructure sovereignty when, as he puts it, “globalization and Davos were still cool.”

This check-print style stands out from most of the polo shirts in my closet, so I’m seriously considering picking one up at this price. Priced from $13.50, you’re talking about a fraction of the price you’d need to spend on a big brand.

items.summary: The creator of TV Time is building a successor app that will let users import their watch histories and preserve the community that formed around discussing their favorite shows.

items.title: Travel up to 112 miles on Segway’s premium Xyber e-bike bundled with an extra battery for a $2,900 low ($1,400 off)
items.summary: Segway is continuing to offer the best deal we have seen to date that gives you the premium Xyber Electric Bike with a FREE extra battery for $2,899.99 shipped. It’s keeping down from a $3,300 MSRP, which we’ve been more frequently seeing discounted to the $2,900 low, however, there is a very big difference while this particular deal lasts. It’s the first time the brand has offered an extra battery ($1,000 value) with the e-bike at its lowest price, giving you more time to take advantage of the combined $1,400 savings – plus, the Xafari Fat Tire Electric Bike is also keeping to its newest $1,550 low during this time, too.

items.summary:
Rechargeable UGREEN FineTrack Slim Find My Wallet tracker

Buy for $18 (Reg. $25)

Prime-exclusive discount.

This updated version of UGREEN’s FineTrack Slim card tracker features a rechargeable battery that lasts up to a year and can be topped up with any MagSafe charger. It retains the same wallet-friendly design, Apple Find My support, real-time tracking, IP68 water resistance, and a loud 100dB alert for locating misplaced items.

items.title: Worx’s compact 1,870 max PSI electric pressure washer hits $110, or the 2,090 max PSI counterpart is down at $160
items.summary: Amazon is offering the Worx 13A Max 1,870 PSI Compact Electric Pressure Washer down at $109.99 shipped right now. While you may find it with a $150 MSRP directly from Worx, at Amazon it’s only been spotted climbing as high as $125 in 2026, with discounts having mostly brought the price down between $120 and $110, though June’s Prime Day event did see it dip a little lower to $104. If you missed out then, it’s only sitting $6 higher here for the second-lowest price we have tracked in the last 12 months. You can also find the more powerful 13A 2,090 PSI Electric Pressure Washer down at $159.99 shipped, down from $230, which is also the second-lowest price of the last year, or more of the brand’s tool deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: This 250W Anker Prime charging station with LCD can replace six chargers, now at $95 low
items.summary: Anker’s summer sale is still going strong at Amazon, with the brand’s official storefront offering loads of discounts there. A notable deal that just went live as part of this sale gets you the 250W 6-port Prime charging station for $94.99 shipped. This is originally a $170 unit that has more recently been going for $150 at Amazon. Today’s deal takes $55 off its usual going rate with a 37% discount to mark the return of the lowest price it first hit during a recent Prime Day sale. Newegg is also matching this discounted price at $95 with a promo code, so be sure to check out both deals and snag it now for your desk in case you missed it during the Prime Day sale.

items.title: Belkin’s 100W USB-C GaN Wall Charger just dropped to the $25.50 Amazon all-time low
items.summary:
Belkin 100W USB-C Wall Charger

Buy for $25.50 (Reg. $30)

What we love

If you’re looking for a MacBook or laptop wall charger upgrade, this one comes from one of the better accessory brands out there at a price super close to the bargain bin brands here today. It can take a MacBook Air 13-inch “from 0-50% in just 20 minutes” at a size “33% smaller than the original 96W MacBook charger,” with a 100W output and an included 5-foot USB-C cable.

items.title: Segway’s Navimow i215 LiDAR robot mower can join your household at its $1,399 low or score a garage bundle at a $1,649 low
items.summary: Through its official Navimow Amazon storefront, Segway is offering the i215 LiDAR Robot Lawn Mower at $1,399 shipped, matching the price we see directly from the brand’s website. Normally fetching $1,599 since hitting the market in February, we’ve only seen three different sales events offering discounts, which include last month’s Prime Day – all of which cut costs to this same rate. You’re getting a prolonged $200 markdown here after the brand’s long-lasting Prime Day deals ended last week for the best price we have tracked, as well as a bonus chance to score the robot with a Garage M attachment bundle at its $1,649 low.

items.title: SpaceX cleared to fly Starship again after booster failure in May
items.summary: This will be the first Starship test flight for SpaceX as a public company, testing the market's appetite for the company's "fly, fail, fix" approach to rocket development, which often ends in fireballs.

items.summary:

Unlike conventional lithium-ion batteries, it replaces graphite with graphene in the anode, with NanoMalaysia claiming this enables up to three times greater energy storage capacity. According to the report, the project cost around […]

items.title: Reed Jobs would rather talk about curing cancer than his last name
items.summary: When we last sat down with Jobs at TechCrunch Disrupt nearly three years ago, his firm Yosemite was brand new and biotech was still reeling from its post-pandemic crash. Now, the venture outfit has a team of 17; a cluster of blockbuster drugs are all losing patent protection in roughly the same window, creating all kinds of new opportunities; and AI has gone from a curiosity to, in Jobs' words, a huge part of what Yosemite does. "I didn't expect Yosemite to be moving this fast," he said.
